emails.subject: Re: Update on Emerson
emails.body: Re: Update on Emerson We do not have an ISDA master in place with this cpy, however, Susan Bailey and Sara Shackleton did send them a draft in August. I would think unless ECTRIC is going to be a direct cpy to a master, Craig Young should contact Susan and Sara directly...? Justin Boyd 10/23/2000 10:21 AM
